title: SafeRoute-UQ: Uncertainty-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Reliable Route Assistance
description: End-to-end RAG system for route and road-notice QA with calibrated uncertainty estimation and risk-aware decision gating. Uses FAISS + SentenceTransformers retrieval, token-level entropy, fusion-based trust scoring, and green/amber/red outputs.

title: WhiteBox-UQ-RAG
description: White-box uncertainty quantification for retrieval-augmented QA using token-level log-probabilities, retrieval signals, calibration, and cross-model evaluation. Focused on whether internal model confidence predicts answer correctness.

title: Gmail AI Assistant
description: Local email summarization and reply-draft assistant using Gmail API and Ollama/Mistral 7B. Processes email content locally, cleans HTML and links, and generates contextual responses while keeping sensitive content on-device.

title: Decision and Motion Planning for Autonomous Driving (CARLA)
description: Hierarchical autonomous driving planner in CARLA combining FSM-based behavioral decisions, cubic-spiral motion planning, collision checking, and velocity profile generation for safe and smooth trajectories.

title: Multimodal RAG Pipeline
description: Event-driven RAG system built with FastAPI, Inngest, Qdrant, and OpenAI. Supports PDF ingestion, chunking, embedding search, and contextual question answering through a modular backend.

title: Autonomous Vehicle Path Planning and PID Control using CARLA
description: Autonomous driving project focused on path planning and PID control in CARLA. Integrates planning and low-level control for simulated vehicle navigation.

title: Minigrid DQN DoorKey 6x6
description: Reinforcement learning project using DQN on the DoorKey 6x6 MiniGrid environment. Focused on sparse-reward navigation and agent training in a constrained grid world.

title: AI Coding Assistant Prototype
description: Internal assistant for code review and documentation using LangChain and OpenAI GPT-4 API. Benchmarked against human-written code.

title: Agentic Workflow Optimization System
description: AI agent for automating documentation and report generation. Compared OpenAI, Anthropic, and AWS Bedrock, with about 50% faster task completion.

title: Generative AI Knowledge Retrieval Tool
description: RAG pipeline with FAISS and embedding search, plus lightweight LLM fine-tuning for QA over structured datasets.

title: 3D Vision-Based Automation Project
description: Real-time object tracking for humanoid robotics using OpenCV and PyTorch, with sensor-fusion-based perception-to-actuation integration.

title: Process Data Visualization Tool
description: Streamlit dashboard for real-time workflow efficiency metrics in industrial automation.
